name: Russian Cheese Babka
recipeIngredient: 1 cup large curd style cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 7 ingredients and beat until smooth.
2. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
3. Line a clean flower pot whole with moistened cheesecloth.
4. Place the mixture inside the lined pot and put it on a rack to drain in the refrigerator overnight or longer.
5. Unmold and garnish with candied cherries.
